SEARCH
Package com.parsons.controller

Class Utils

java.lang.Object
com.parsons.controller.Utils
public final class Utils extends Object
Shared constants and UI helper methods for all views in the Parsons Problems app. Not instantiable -- all members are static.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    BLOCK_PANEL_WIDTH
    Width of one code block panel (MAX_COLS * ~13px per char).
    static final int
    DIVIDER_LOCATION
    Default divider position splitting the frame into two equal halves.
    static final int
    FRAME_HEIGHT
    Frame height shared across all views (16:9 ratio).
    static final int
    FRAME_MARGIN
    Margin around the outer edges of the frame.
    static final int
    FRAME_WIDTH
    Full width for two-panel views such as SolverView.
    static final int
    LAUNCHER_HEIGHT
    Height for the launcher window.
    static final int
    LAUNCHER_WIDTH
    Width for the launcher window.
    static final int
    MAX_COLS
    Maximum number of characters per line in a code block.
    static final int
    NARROW_FRAME_WIDTH
    Width for single-panel views such as StudentWelcomeView.
    static final int
    PANEL_PAD
    Padding around panels.
    static final int
    TIGHT_GAP
    Gap between tightly related elements such as code blocks in a list.

  • Method Details

    • createNavBar

      public static JPanel createNavBar(boolean showHomeButton, boolean showClose, JFrame frameParam)
      Creates a navigation bar panel for the top of each view. Layout: | Home (label or button) ... Quit [Close] |
      Parameters:
      showHomeButton - true = Home is a JButton (SolverView, EditorView) false = Home is a JLabel (WelcomeViews)
      showClose - true = Close Window button is shown
      frameParam - the parent frame, used for dispose() and home navigation
      Returns:
      a JPanel to place in BorderLayout.NORTH

    • createCreditsPanel

      public static JPanel createCreditsPanel()
      Creates a credits panel for the bottom of the welcome views. Layout: | Developed by: [comma separated names] |
      Returns:
      a JPanel to place in BorderLayout.SOUTH

    • makeCodeBlock

      public static JLabel makeCodeBlock(String code)
      Creates a draggable code block label with monospace font and blue border.
      Parameters:
      code - the code string to display in the block
      Returns:
      a styled draggable JLabel

    • makeDropTarget

      public static void makeDropTarget(JPanel panelParam)
      Makes a JPanel a drop target that accepts dragged code blocks. Removes the block from its source panel and adds it to this panel.
      Parameters:
      panelParam - the panel to make a drop target

    • parseFile

      public static List<ParsonsProblem> parseFile(String filepath) throws IOException
      File parser helper method for extracting new parsons problem from a .txt file.
      Parameters:
      filepath - the user provided path to the new problems file.
      Returns:
      A list of parsed ParsonsProblem objects.
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurs when the input file cannot be found or read.
